parameters.text: =Connect your X account here: Authorize XMonitor on X This link expires in 10 minutes.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: $json }];

parameters.text: XMonitor Monitor tracked X accounts, review negative reply alerts, and act on flagged posts from Telegram. Fast start /auth_x - Connect the X account that owns posts you may need to moderate /track USERS - Replace the tracked X accounts /help - Show this guide Alert actions Use the buttons on each alert when possible. Commands also work: /ignore POST_ID - Stop scheduled alerts for a post /snooze POST_ID - Choose how long to snooze alerts /resume POST_ID - Return a post to active monitoring /hide_replies POST_ID - Hide stored negative replies for an owned post /order_likes POST_ID AMOUNT - Order likes after validation /order_comments POST_ID - Generate and confirm counter replies Tracking examples /track username /track @username /track username1 username2 /track https://x.com/username Tracking replaces the full tracked-user list for this chat. Usernames are normalized and deduplicated.

nodes.name: Link Telegram User To X User

parameters.text: XMonitor Monitor tracked X accounts, review negative reply alerts, and act on flagged posts from Telegram. Fast start /auth_x - Connect the X account that owns posts you may need to moderate /track USERS - Replace the tracked X accounts /help - Show this guide Alert actions Use the buttons on each alert when possible. Commands also work: /ignore POST_ID - Stop scheduled alerts for a post /snooze POST_ID - Choose how long to snooze alerts /resume POST_ID - Return a post to active monitoring /hide_replies POST_ID - Hide stored negative replies for an owned post /order_likes POST_ID AMOUNT - Order likes after validation /order_comments POST_ID - Generate and confirm counter replies Tracking examples /track username /track @username /track username1 username2 /track https://x.com/username Tracking replaces the full tracked-user list for this chat. Usernames are normalized and deduplicated.

options.systemMessage:
You are given a JSON object containing one post and a list of replies under that post.

Your job is to write one appropriate counter-reply strictly in lebanese arabic only for each reply.

Use the original post as context. The counter-reply should respond to the reply, not just repeat the post.

Rules:
- Return valid JSON only.
- Do not include markdown.
- Do not include explanations.
- Do not skip any reply.
- Preserve each reply_id exactly.
- Keep each counter-reply concise and natural.
- Reply strictly in lebanese arabic only
- Do not invent facts.
- Never reply in the second person, just find the closest countering point that supports the post and defends it against a criticism similar to the reply.
- You cant reply to people directly, you just provide a different viewpoint to each reply in order to support the post.
- If a reply is unclear, write a neutral clarifying counter-reply.
- If a reply is hostile, respond calmly and firmly.
- If a reply disagrees, write a respectful counterargument based on the post context.

parameters.message: =These are the replies suggested, press Respond and select your preferred course of action.

values.fieldLabel: What would you like to do?

additionalFields.text: Enter the number of likes to order.

parameters.message: =Enter the number of likes to order for post {{ $('Parse Telegram Message').first().json.post_id }}.

options.responseFormDescription: =Enter a positive whole-number amount for post {{ $('Parse Telegram Message').first().json.post_id }}.

parameters.text: I couldn't find a valid X username to track. Send /track followed by one or more @usernames or X profile links.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public."Order Info" (
  provider,
  provider_order_id,
  order_type,
  post_id,
  telegram_chat_id,
  x_username,
  link,
  service_id,
  quantity,
  comment_count,
  request_payload,
  provider_add_response,
  provider_status,
  normalized_status,
  next_check_at
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9::integer, $10::integer, $11::jsonb, $12::jsonb, $13, $14, $15::timestamptz)
ON CONFLICT (provider, provider_order_id) DO UPDATE
SET
  order_type = EXCLUDED.order_type,
  post_id = EXCLUDED.post_id,
  telegram_chat_id = EXCLUDED.telegram_chat_id,
  x_username = EXCLUDED.x_username,
  link = EXCLUDED.link,
  service_id = EXCLUDED.service_id,
  quantity = EXCLUDED.quantity,
  comment_count = EXCLUDED.comment_count,
  request_payload = EXCLUDED.request_payload,
  provider_add_response = EXCLUDED.provider_add_response,
  provider_status = EXCLUDED.provider_status,
  normalized_status = EXCLUDED.normalized_status,
  next_check_at = EXCLUDED.next_check_at,
  last_error = NULL
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO public."Order Info" (
  provider,
  provider_order_id,
  order_type,
  post_id,
  telegram_chat_id,
  x_username,
  link,
  service_id,
  quantity,
  comment_count,
  request_payload,
  provider_add_response,
  provider_status,
  normalized_status,
  next_check_at
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9::integer, $10::integer, $11::jsonb, $12::jsonb, $13, $14, $15::timestamptz)
ON CONFLICT (provider, provider_order_id) DO UPDATE
SET
  order_type = EXCLUDED.order_type,
  post_id = EXCLUDED.post_id,
  telegram_chat_id = EXCLUDED.telegram_chat_id,
  x_username = EXCLUDED.x_username,
  link = EXCLUDED.link,
  service_id = EXCLUDED.service_id,
  quantity = EXCLUDED.quantity,
  comment_count = EXCLUDED.comment_count,
  request_payload = EXCLUDED.request_payload,
  provider_add_response = EXCLUDED.provider_add_response,
  provider_status = EXCLUDED.provider_status,
  normalized_status = EXCLUDED.normalized_status,
  next_check_at = EXCLUDED.next_check_at,
  last_error = NULL
RETURNING *;

UPDATE public."Posts"
SET status = 'Processing'
WHERE post_id = $1
RETURNING post_id, status;

parameters.text: Comment order canceled. I will not place an order for this post.
